name: Attack
note:
スキル１番は［攻撃］コマンドを
選択したときに使用されます。

name: Guard
note:
スキル２番は［防御］コマンドを
選択したときに使用されます。

description: Restore your strength with meditation. This is the first step towards martial arts. \nIt's an easy recovery technique.
name: Meditation

description:
Simple treatment. Recovers a small amount of HP.\nBut please
note that it's just a simple treatment.
name: Basic treatment

description:
Let out a shout to get fired up. \V[213] Buff is a standard
move.
name: Get ready!

description:
Provokes and shakes the spirit. \V[214]\nIt decreases
defense power.
name: Taunt

description:
Reduce damage. Consume 30 HP to recover SP. \nEndure the
pain and recover SP.
name: Endure

description:
A calculated strategy of deliberately exposing weaknesses.
\V[215] \nIt seems necessary to take risks as well.
name: Expose vulnerability.

description: Concentrate your mind. \V[216] \nStrengthen your defense.
name: Mental Focus

description:
Refresh your feelings. Abnormal conditions and stamina are
restored.\nThe amount of recovery is small.
name: Calm down.

description:
Emergency medical treatment. Restore HP generously. \nYou'll
recover quite a bit.
name: Emergency treatment

description:
HP and SP are automatically restored. The effect lasts for 5
turns. It's a convenient skill.
message1: I have overcome the turmoil in my heart!
name: Mind annihilate.

description: Requires 3% of current HP. The power changes depending on the level of sex. \V[219]\nDischarge your impulses by consuming your physical strength.
name: Surging Strike

description:
Hit the opponent with your whole body. There is a low chance
of causing a stun. It also inflicts damage.
name: Body Slam

description:
Attacking with a sweeping motion. The strength is
questionable.  The practicality is uncertain.
name: Mowing down

description:
A surprise attack. A strike that ignores defense.\nIt is a
useful attack.
name: Unexpected Strike

description:
A technique that ordinary people cannot perform. It launches
an attack that ignores defense.\nA superior version of a surprise blow.
name: Armor-piercing

description:
Spin and slash. It has quite a power.\nBut there is a lot of
waste.
name: Rotation Slash

description:
A technique with a high chance of causing stun. However, it
does not inflict any damage.  Well, it's just a leg sweep.
name: Sweeping Leg

description:
Powerful attack. Consumes 15% of current HP. \V[220]
Exhausted due to giving it all.
message1: I swung it down with all my might!
name: Swing down with all your might.

description:
Perform a guaranteed hit attack. \V[217] \nCharge forward at
full power.
name: Full-force assault.

description:
A technique that allows you to perform two normal attacks.
It requires 10% of maximum HP. \V[239]\nExhaustion is natural with consecutive attacks.
name: Continual Slashes

description:
Unleash a devastating blow. It's an incredibly powerful
strike. The force behind it is tremendous.
name: Powerful Strike

description:
Famous secret technique. It's not the real deal, but it's
strong. It can truly be called a secret technique.
name: Swallow Return

description:
Attack three times in a row. Requires 25% of current
HP.\V[240]\nTriple strike is tiring as usual.
name: Triple Thrust.

description: Requires 20% of current HP. The power changes depending on the level of sex. \V[219]\nDesire is tiring.
name: Bursting Desire Combo

description:
A technique that disrupts the balance of enemies. Simple yet
surprisingly useful? It doesn't deal damage, but it has a high chance of causing stun.
name: Sweeping Leg

description:
Use your whole body to collide with the opponent. Inflict
damage on a single enemy and have a low chance of destabilizing their balance.
name: Tackle.

description: Perform a powerful attack against a single enemy.
name: Power Strike

description:
A fantastic technique that cannot be easily used by ordinary
people. It performs an attack that ignores the enemy's defense on a single target.
name: Shote-tsuki

description: The combination technique of the physical education teacher and the principal.
name: Two Platoon Attack
note: 教頭と体育教師の組み合わせのボスの技

description: Hug tightly and deal damage.
name: Embrace

description: Perform a powerful attack against a single enemy.
name: Teacher's Blow

description:
Increase your attack power by getting fired up. Your attack
power will increase for 4 turns!
name: Raise the tension.

description: Blinding Strike. You may become in darkness.
name: Eye gouge

description:
A regrettable exhale peculiar to males. You might get all
sorts of condition problems, you know?
name: Old man's sigh.

description: Perform a powerful attack against a single enemy.
name: Fist

description: Perform a powerful attack against a single enemy.
name: Chop.

description: Attack power increases for 3 turns!
name: Roar

description: Deliver consecutive strikes.
name: Mashing

description: Restore your stamina.
name: To stubbornly persist.

description: Perform a powerful attack against a single enemy.
name: Slap

description: Perform a powerful attack against a single enemy.
name: Principal punch

description:
To spread a strong scent and make the opponent feel
dispirited. Attack and defense decrease for 4 turns.
name: To exude a strong masculine scent.

description: Perform a powerful attack against a single enemy.
name: Fighting Kick

description:
Spew toxic water from the mouth. Inflicts damage and has a
chance to poison.
name: Poison Mist

description: Perform a powerful attack against a single enemy.
message1: %1 has slammed it with all their might!
name: Slam

description: I will punch with full force directly in front.
name: Straight Punch

description: Perform a powerful attack against a single enemy.
name: Mysterious and incomprehensible combo attacks.

description:
The attack and defense decrease for three turns after
dealing mental damage with a blown kiss.
name: Blowing a kiss

description: Inflicts major damage with a passionate kiss.
name: Passionate Kiss

description: Raise the attack power of all allies slightly for 5 turns.
name: Goddess's Embrace

description: For 5 turns, the user will be in a state of automatic HP recovery.
name: Self-deception

description: Deal water attribute damage to a single enemy.
name: Water

description: Remove your own debuffs.
name: Dispel

description: Inflicts damage on a single enemy, ignoring their defense.
name: Goddess's Wrath

description: Perform a powerful attack against a single enemy.
name: Goddess Slap

description: Disturb the balance of a single enemy.
name: Sweeping Leg

description: Perform a magic-based holy attribute attack against all enemies.
name: Divine punishment

description: Perform a sure-hit attack on a single enemy, slightly reducing their attack power.
name: Goddess Punch

description:
Perform a powerful attack that ignores the enemies' defense
against all enemies. Can act faster than usual.
name: A devastating blow that ignores defense.

description: Perform a powerful attack against a single enemy.
name: Single-minded focus

description: For 5 turns, increase the defense and magic defense of all allies.
name: Selfish Blessing

description: Absorb the HP of a single enemy.
name: Drain☆Touch

description: Inflict darkness status on all enemies.
name: Foggy Slash

description: Inflicts Earth attribute damage on a single enemy.
name: Black stone

description: Deal wind attribute damage to a single enemy.
name: A deep black rage

description:
Sword Technique. Performs a powerful attack on a single
enemy and silences them. The damage depends on the user's attack power and magic power.
name: Mad Blossoming Song

description: Perform an attack that ignores the enemy's defense on a single target.
name: Random Attack

description: Perform a sure-hit attack on a single enemy, slightly reducing their attack power.
message1: They launched an attack with a mysterious shout!
name: Soiya☆

description: For 5 turns, increase the defense and magic defense of all allies.
name: Raise the tension.

description: Perform a powerful attack against a single enemy.
name: Powerful Strike

description: For 5 turns, slightly increase the user's attack and defense power.
name: Mental Focus

description: Perform a magic-based holy attribute attack against all enemies.
name: Divine Punishment of Darkness

description: Perform a guaranteed hit attack on a single enemy and slightly lower their defense.
name: Fatigue Strike

description: Absorb the HP of a single enemy.
name: Bloodsucker Blade

description: Remove the enemy's single-target enhancement magic.
name: Dispel Strike

description: Inflicts damage on a single enemy, ignoring their defense.
name: Exploding Palm

description: Perform a powerful attack against a single enemy.
name: Powerful attack.

description: Perform a magic-based holy attribute attack against all enemies.
name: Wave of the Abyss

description: Raise the attack power of all allies slightly for 3 turns.
name: Dark attire

description: Perform a guaranteed hit attack on a single enemy and slightly lower their defense.
name: Thunder Strike

description: Perform an attack that ignores the enemy's defense on a single target.
name: Armor-piercing

description: Perform a powerful attack against a single enemy.
name: Rapid Strike, Punch, Power Strike

description: Deal dark attribute damage to a single enemy.
name: Shade

description: Inflicts damage on a single enemy, ignoring their defense.
name: Explosion

description: Restore the HP of a single ally.
name: Blessed Winds

description:
Increase the attack power, defense power, magic power, and
magic defense of a single ally. The effect lasts for 5 turns.
name: Blessing of the Spirits

description: Lower the attack and defense power of a single enemy for 5 turns.
name: Cursed Incantation

description: Restore the HP of a single ally.
name: To stubbornly persist.

description: Perform a powerful attack against a single enemy.
name: Fight desperately.

description: Inflict fire damage to all enemies.
name: Freedom.

description: Inflict ice-type damage on all enemies.
name: Breezard

description: Inflicts thunder damage to all enemies.
name: Spark

description: Perform an attack that ignores the enemy's defense on a single target.
name: Unexpected Strike

description:
Perform a powerful double attack that ignores the enemy's
defense against a single target. Alicia's spontaneous secret technique!
name: Yaaaay!

description: Perform a magic-based holy attribute attack against all enemies.
name: Merciless Strike
